TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Pasawali_pisacepo’_a_kimad, title = Pasawali_pisacepo’_a_kimad, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Pasawali_pisacepo’_a_kimad} }

S.FORM: == Pasawali pisacepo' a kimad – fafahiyan kanatal a kimad. == Fafahiyan sa'etal a kimad masowal i niyaro no 'Amis/Pangcah, halo 'Amis/Pangcah finacadan ato Sakicaya finacadan, o nian ko satapangan to pisacepo' no niyaro'. Mifoting ko fainayan, masamaan a tahasiday, tayra i no fafahiyan a kanatal, tora a kanatal saheto o fafahiyan, halafin itira a malepel, tona pakatama to mimingay po'ot mitakaw milaliw, mapanakay no 'iso i niyaro, masasi'araw to niyaro'ay tamdaw, itiya pasadak to kinaira to malosapato'aya sapiahowid. Onini a kimad, manawnaw itira toya sa'etal i riyar, nai riyar mikalic to ta'akay foting a minokay, pasikawas no riyar ato ta'akay ko pipacakat, matiniay a kimadan, pahapinang to yincumin ato riyar a masasiketay. Da'oc no finacadan taira riyar a mifotingay, o sakaira no kadofahay a foting ato rihaday ko pinokay, pakayni to nia fafahiyan a sa'etal a kimad ato pisacepo' a lisin malecad ko pirocok to sakiriyar a mingodo to sapitari'ang. Mifalicay to tilid. Ci Masao Nikar
S.PHON: == pasawaɾi pisaʦəpo~uʡ a kimaɬ~ɮ * fafaħijan kanataɾ a kimaɬ~ɮ. == fafaħijan saʡətaɾ a kimaɬ~ɮ maso~uwaɾ i nijaro~u no~u ʡamis/paŋʦaħ, ħaɾo~u ʡamis/paŋʦaħ finaʦaɬ~ɮan ato~u sakiʦaja finaʦaɬ~ɮan, o~u nian ko~u satapaŋan to~u pisaʦəpo~uʡ no~u nijaro~uʡ. mifo~utiŋ ko~u fainajan, masamaan a taħasiɬ~ɮaj, tajra i no~u fafaħijan a kanataɾ, to~ura a kanataɾ saħəto~u o~u fafaħijan, ħaɾafin itira a maɾəpəɾ, to~una pakatama to~u mimiŋaj po~uʡo~ut mitakaw miɾaɾiw, mapanakaj no~u ʡiso~u i nijaro~u, masasiʡaraw to~u nijaro~uʡaj tamɬ~ɮaw, itija pasaɬ~ɮak to~u kinaira to~u maɾo~usapato~uʡaja sapiaħo~uwiɬ~ɮ. o~unini a kimaɬ~ɮ, manawnaw itira to~uja saʡətaɾ i rijar, nai rijar mikaɾiʦ to~u taʡakaj fo~utiŋ a mino~ukaj, pasikawas no~u rijar ato~u taʡakaj ko~u pipaʦakat, matiniaj a kimaɬ~ɮan, paħapinaŋ to~u jinʦo~u~umin ato~u rijar a masasikətaj. ɬ~ɮaʡo~uʦ no~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan taira rijar a mifo~utiŋaj, o~u sakaira no~u kaɬ~ɮo~ufaħaj a fo~utiŋ ato~u riħaɬ~ɮaj ko~u pino~ukaj, pakajni to~u nia fafaħijan a saʡətaɾ a kimaɬ~ɮ ato~u pisaʦəpo~uʡ a ɾisin maɾəʦaɬ~ɮ ko~u piro~uʦo~uk to~u sakirijar a miŋo~uɬ~ɮo~u to~u sapitariʡaŋ. mifaɾiʦaj to~u tiɾiɬ~ɮ. ʦi masao~u nikar
S.FORM: == Pasawali pisacepo' a kimad – fafahiyan kanatal a kimad. == Fafahiyan sa'etal a kimad masowal i niyaro no 'Amis/Pangcah, halo 'Amis/Pangcah finacadan ato Sakicaya finacadan, o nian ko satapangan to pisacepo' no niyaro'. Mifoting ko fainayan, masamaan a tahasiday, tayra i no fafahiyan a kanatal, tora a kanatal saheto o fafahiyan, halafin itira a malepel, tona pakatama to mimingay po'ot mitakaw milaliw, mapanakay no 'iso i niyaro, masasi'araw to niyaro'ay tamdaw, itiya pasadak to kinaira to malosapato'aya sapiahowid. Onini a kimad, manawnaw itira toya sa'etal i riyar, nai riyar mikalic to ta'akay foting a minokay, pasikawas no riyar ato ta'akay ko pipacakat, matiniay a kimadan, pahapinang to yincumin ato riyar a masasiketay. Da'oc no finacadan taira riyar a mifotingay, o sakaira no kadofahay a foting ato rihaday ko pinokay, pakayni to nia fafahiyan a sa'etal a kimad ato pisacepo' a lisin malecad ko pirocok to sakiriyar a mingodo to sapitari'ang. Mifalicay to tilid. Ci Masao Nikar
S.PHON: == pasawaɾi pisaʦəpo~uʡ a kimaɬ~ɮ * fafaħijan kanataɾ a kimaɬ~ɮ. == fafaħijan saʡətaɾ a kimaɬ~ɮ maso~uwaɾ i nijaro~u no~u ʡamis/paŋʦaħ, ħaɾo~u ʡamis/paŋʦaħ finaʦaɬ~ɮan ato~u sakiʦaja finaʦaɬ~ɮan, o~u nian ko~u satapaŋan to~u pisaʦəpo~uʡ no~u nijaro~uʡ. mifo~utiŋ ko~u fainajan, masamaan a taħasiɬ~ɮaj, tajra i no~u fafaħijan a kanataɾ, to~ura a kanataɾ saħəto~u o~u fafaħijan, ħaɾafin itira a maɾəpəɾ, to~una pakatama to~u mimiŋaj po~uʡo~ut mitakaw miɾaɾiw, mapanakaj no~u ʡiso~u i nijaro~u, masasiʡaraw to~u nijaro~uʡaj tamɬ~ɮaw, itija pasaɬ~ɮak to~u kinaira to~u maɾo~usapato~uʡaja sapiaħo~uwiɬ~ɮ. o~unini a kimaɬ~ɮ, manawnaw itira to~uja saʡətaɾ i rijar, nai rijar mikaɾiʦ to~u taʡakaj fo~utiŋ a mino~ukaj, pasikawas no~u rijar ato~u taʡakaj ko~u pipaʦakat, matiniaj a kimaɬ~ɮan, paħapinaŋ to~u jinʦo~u~umin ato~u rijar a masasikətaj. ɬ~ɮaʡo~uʦ no~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan taira rijar a mifo~utiŋaj, o~u sakaira no~u kaɬ~ɮo~ufaħaj a fo~utiŋ ato~u riħaɬ~ɮaj ko~u pino~ukaj, pakajni to~u nia fafaħijan a saʡətaɾ a kimaɬ~ɮ ato~u pisaʦəpo~uʡ a ɾisin maɾəʦaɬ~ɮ ko~u piro~uʦo~uk to~u sakirijar a miŋo~uɬ~ɮo~u to~u sapitariʡaŋ. mifaɾiʦaj to~u tiɾiɬ~ɮ. ʦi masao~u nikar
